order.title: Welcome
order.agree: I agree with the <1>terms and conditions</1>
order.thxtext: Thank you for your payments, you will receive an invoice in your inbox with 2 business day. For any question or enquires please write to help@kli.one
order.errortext: The payment was not successful due to the following error:
order.errortext2: You can get in touch with help@kli.one for any question or enquiries.
order.thanksstep3: Congratulations! You have successfully registered for the congress. Soon you will receive an email confirming your participation in the congress, as well as with a detailed description of the congress program and links to connect.
order.closethepage: Well done! You can close the page

userMenu.logOutText: Do you really want to quit?
